signals.title: Estatuto Digital da Criança e do Adolescente (ECA Digital)
signals.summary: The ECA Digital is a legislation that establishes measures to protect minors in the online environment, including age verification and parental control requirements. It impacts technology companies, online service providers, and game developers.
key_provisions: Creation of an autonomous protection authority

signals.title: Lei Federal nº 15.211/2025 (ECA Digital or Lei Felca)
signals.summary: This federal law establishes new rules to ensure the safety of children and adolescents in the digital environment, including prohibitions on self-declaration of age and requirements for account linking.
key_provisions: Prohibition of registration on betting platforms
Content filtering and mandatory age verification on adult sites

signals.title: Orientações Preliminares da ANPD para Verificação de Idade
signals.summary: The ANPD published preliminary guidelines for implementing age verification mechanisms to ensure compliance with privacy and data protection rights for children and adolescents.
key_provisions: Focus on privacy and data protection
Monitoring of app stores and operating systems

signals.title: Relatório do MJSP sobre Mecanismos de Aferição de Idade
signals.summary: The MJSP released a report analyzing public contributions to age verification mechanisms, aiming to support the regulation of the ECA Digital.
